commit.message: Fix CLI entrypoint for resume bin

Add Tab keyboard shortcut to toggle yolo mode

Users can now press Tab to toggle yolo mode on/off in the session picker.
The status line displays "resume in yolo mode" when enabled. The initial
state respects the --yolo CLI flag.
Improve wrapper script by relying on a bash script for handoff
Fix session preview to use latest user message and improve test reliability
